title: Enhanced Vanilla
description: A modpack that improves vanilla Minecraft: more convenience, beauty and optimization.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NUN2DuSB/images/1177f152578069ca4b2c7e60a31a78940f1fc0c6.jpeg) ![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/693733fa931d138a25a8ffc7cf87ac1b251da5a2.png)
⚡Performance optimization Sodium, Sodium Extra, ImmediatelyFast, Lithium, FerriteCore, EntityCulling, ScalableLux, spark, Clumps, More Culling, Krypton, Let Me Despawn, Noisium, Smoke Suppression, Fast Item Frames, BadOptimizations, Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (C2ME), Dynamic FPS, ModernFix, ThreadTweak.
✨Improved graphics, visual effects, realism, atmospherics Visuality, Better Snow Coverage, Snow Under Trees, Particle Rain, Explosive Enhancement, Particular, Falling Leaves, Continuity, 3D Skin Layers, Female Gender Mod, My Totem Doll, Boat Item View, Diagonal Fences, Diagonal Walls, Diagonal Windows, Elytra physics, Entity Model Features, Entity Texture Features, Iris, Particle Effects Reforged, Voxy, WaveyCapes.
🖥️Improved interface Xaero's Minimap, Xaero's World Map, Advancements Reloaded, Almanac, AppleSkin, Better Mount HUD, Better Statistics Screen, BetterCommandBlockUI, BetterF3, Blur Perfected, Chat Heads, Chat Patches, ChatAnimation, Dark Loading Screen, Durability Tooltip, GUI Clock, GUI Effect Timer, Jade, Language Reload, Mod Menu, Reese's Sodium Options, Shulker Box Tooltip, Smooth Scroll, Zoomify.
🔊Sounds AmbientSounds, CoolRain, Presence Footsteps, Sound Physics Remastered, Sounds
🕺Animations NotEnoughAnimations, Fresh Animations.
⚙️QoL features Inventory Profiles Next, BetterThanMending, Enchanting Infuser, Bedrock Miner, CalcMod, Carry On, Cherished Worlds, ClickThrough Plus, Dismount Entity, Double Doors, e4mc, Easy Anvils, Harvest with ease, Infinite Trading, ItemSwapper, Jump Over Fences, Leaves Be Gone, Lighty, Litematica, Litematica Printer, Map Distance Fix, Chunk Loaders, Chunky, Folders!, LANLock, Mouse Tweaks, Nature's Compass, NetherPortalFix, No Feather Trample, Playtime Command, Remove Reloading Screen, SchematicPreview, Screencopy, Tree Harvester, Veinminer, Villager Trading Plus, VisualKeys, ModListMemory.
🗄️Improved storage Tom's Simple Storage Mod, Nether Chested.
🎨More creative possibilities Axiom, WorldEdit, Litematica, Flashback
🏆More than 1000 achievements, index for collecting every single block BlazeandCave's Advancements Pack, Completionist's Index How to use it: Create New World > More > Data Packs > Open Pack Folder Open .minecraft\datapacks and move "BlazeandCave's Advancements Pack [Version]" to the mcworld-numbers folder, and move it from Available to Selected and click Done --------------------- To open the settings: Open to LAN, Allow Commands: ON Write to chat /function blazeandcave:config_menu You can enable Cooperative Mode if you want to share your achievements with a friend. --------------------- To track the number of achievements made: Advancement Scoreboard Display Settings > Advancements Scoreboard > On sidebar / On tab list
**🔧Slightly adjusted settings: controls, mods, graphics**
